thresholdNote: Process is 100% on the stable 8.9.x line; the 8.10.0-SNAPSHOT report tooling under-counts to ~93%, so the machine gate floor is 0.90. Process-integration target is 40% while PIR-2/PIR-3 are disabled pending beeceptor fixtures; re-enabling them (and the booster scenarios) raises it toward 60%.

categories.name: Process tests
categories.blurb: Mocked agent/judge/tool jobs. Every routing path exercised across 7 scenarios; coverage target 90%.

requirements.statement: Every claim reaches exactly one terminal state (no stalls)
A clean low-risk claim is approved without human touch
A fraudulent claim is escalated to a human adjuster
An ambiguous claim with no hard fraud signal goes to manual review
An assessment-agent failure routes to a supervisor and never drops the claim
Missing documents trigger a request, then assessment resumes
The agent escalates a claim it cannot resolve mid-assessment

categories.name: Component integration tests
categories.blurb: Each external system in isolation against real endpoints; judge quality validated with LLM-as-judge and variable checks.

requirements.statement: PolicyLookup connector runs and its segment completes

assertions.text: Start tools process with claimId=CLM-2025-0042, activate only PolicyLookup tool
PolicyLookup element completed (real REST call to beeceptor)
End_PolicyLookup element completed (segment terminates cleanly)
Tools process instance completed

requirements.statement: GetCustomerProfile connector runs and its segment completes

assertions.text: Start tools process with customerId=CUST-4521, activate only GetCustomerProfile tool
GetCustomerProfile element completed (real REST call to beeceptor)
End_GetCustomerProfile element completed (segment terminates cleanly)
Tools process instance completed

requirements.statement: CalculateDamageEstimate connector runs and its segment completes

assertions.text: Start tools process with claimId=CLM-2025-0042, activate only CalculateDamageEstimate tool
CalculateDamageEstimate element completed (real REST call to beeceptor)
End_CalculateDamageEstimate element completed (segment terminates cleanly)
Tools process instance completed

requirements.statement: The assessment report identifies fraud risk and recommends a decision (LLM-as-judge)

assertions.text: Start full process with claimId=CLM-2025-0042 (fraud-laden data from beeceptor)
assessmentReport variable populated by agent (real Bedrock call)
assessmentReport judged to identify fraud risk and recommend escalation (LLM-as-judge)
Judgment verdict = PASS — report meets the fraud-detection quality bar

requirements.statement: The assessment report matches a reference fraud assessment (semantic similarity)

assertions.text: Start full process with claimId=CLM-2025-0042
assessmentReport cosine similarity to reference ≥ 0.70 (Titan embed model)
Verdict = PASS — report is semantically close to the reference

requirements.statement: The Quality Judge populates every quality output it is prompted to produce

assertions.text: Start full process with claimId=CLM-2025-0042; Quality Judge evaluates the assessment
agentQualityScore present and numeric in [0.0, 1.0]
qualityFeedback present and non-empty string
qualityScores map contains keys overallScore and feedback
All quality keys populated — judge emitted parseable responseJson

categories.name: Process integration tests
categories.blurb: Whole process end to end on real Bedrock. Each test proves its requirement's full path to the terminal end event.

requirements.statement: A fraudulent claim is escalated to a human adjuster (full path to End_HumanResolved)

assertions.text: Start process with claimId=CLM-2025-0042, customerId=CUST-4521, claimType=collision (known fraud data)
Agent_ClaimsAssessment completed — real Bedrock multi-tool assessment call
Agent_Judge completed — Quality Judge scored the assessment
Await Task_HumanReview user task active (poll up to 2 min)
Complete Task_HumanReview with adjusterResolution=DENY, adjusterNotes=fraud confirmed
Full path completed: Start_ClaimForm → Agent_ClaimsAssessment → Agent_Judge → Gateway_JudgeDecision → SubProcess_HumanControl → Start_HumanEscalation → Task_HumanReview → End_HumanResolved
Process instance completed

requirements.statement: A clean claim is approved without human touch (full path to End_ClaimApproved)

assertions.text: Start process with claimId=CLM-IT-CLEAN-001, customerId=CUST-IT-CLEAN (clean-risk beeceptor fixture)
Agent_ClaimsAssessment and Agent_Judge completed
claimDecision = APPROVE
End_ClaimApproved completed — no human task activated
Process instance completed

requirements.statement: An ambiguous claim goes to manual review (full path to End_ManualResolved)

assertions.text: Start process with claimId=CLM-IT-BORDER-001, customerId=CUST-IT-BORDER (medium-risk beeceptor fixture)
Agent_ClaimsAssessment and Agent_Judge completed
claimDecision = MANUAL_REVIEW
Await and complete Task_ManualReview with adjusterDecision=APPROVE
End_ManualResolved completed
Process instance completed
